---
name: Demo task
about: Streamlit demo, final integration, screenshots, or demo data exports
title: "[Demo] "
labels: ["demo"]
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the demo feature or integration update.

## Inputs

- Recommendation file:
- Household/profile file:
- Product metadata:
- Metrics/results file:

## Expected Outputs

- [ ] Streamlit page/control:
- [ ] Demo data file:
- [ ] Screenshot or backup artifact:

## UI Behavior Checklist

- [ ] Household selector works.
- [ ] Recommendation table shows rank, product, category, coupon flag, and reason.
- [ ] Budget slider behavior is defined and visible.
- [ ] Missing metadata does not crash the page.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `streamlit run` command works locally.
- [ ] At least one strong demo household is documented.
- [ ] Demo uses reranked recommendations when available.
- [ ] Screenshot or backup recording exists before presentation day.
